page_metadata.bioconda__summary: ADMIXTURE is a software tool for maximum likelihood estimation of individual ancestries from multilocus SNP genotype datasets.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: ADMIXTURE is a software tool for maximum likelihood estimation of individual ancestries from multilocus SNP genotype datasets.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Maximum likelihood estimation of individual ancestries from multilocus SNP genotype datasets. It uses the same statistical model as STRUCTURE but calculates estimates using a fast numerical optimization algorithm.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Maximum likelihood estimation of individual ancestries from multilocus SNP genotype datasets. It uses the same statistical model as STRUCTURE but calculates estimates using a fast numerical optimization algorithm.
